title: senecio adnatus
intro: Senecio adnatus is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Senecio adnatus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Senecio adnatus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are typically taken to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of nausea and cramping.
